/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/REVSA:10-30-20/REIN ORIG TC/CTORD: ELIMINATEIN PERSON CHECK INS WITH THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT/CTORD:  ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT TO CONTACT HIS CASE MANAGER, JENNA GOULDER FROM THE INSTITUTE ON AGING, ONCE PER MONTH TO ENSURE HE IS RECEIVING THE CORE ESSENTIALSERVICES AND SUPERVISION HE NEEDS - WITH BOTH IN PERSON AND TELEPHONIC CONTACT WITH MS, GOULDER, /X:  CURRENTLY, MS, GOULDER SEES MR, SPOONER PHYSICALLY ONE TO TWO TIMES PER MONTH AND PERIODICALLY SPEAKS TO MR, SPOONER ON THE TELEPHONE, /X: SHOULD MS, GOULDER NO LONGER REMAIN AS MR, SPOONER'S CASEMANAGER, THE COURT SHALL ORDER ANOTHER INDIVIDUAL (WHETHER THAT BE AN INDIVIDUAL FROM THE INSTITUTE ON AGING, AN INDIVIDUAL FROM A LONG-TERM RESIDENTIAL CARE FACILITY OR OTHER APPROPRIATE INDIVIDUAL) TAKE OVER SUCH ROLE TO BE IN CONTACT WITH ADULT PROBATION TO INFORM THEM OF MR, SPOONER'S SUPERVISION,/PROB EXT: 11-17-22 /
